dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world ended not with a bang, but with a flash. One moment, I was scrolling through my phone, the next... this.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: What the hell? Where am I? This isn't my apartment. It looks like... some kind of ruin? And why is everyone else looking so confused?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A translucent window flickered before my eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: Status Window? Seriously? Is this some kind of sick joke?

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: [Name: Lee Kiyoung] [Title: None] [Age: 25] [Occupation: None] [Stats] [Strength: 05] [Agility: 06] [Stamina: 07] [Magic Power: 01] [Luck: 08] [Divine Power: 00] [Endurance: 09] [Intelligence: 10] [Talents: None] ...Are you kidding me?! My stats are worse than a common house cat! Magic Power 1?! I'm practically a negative number!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Panic began to set in, but a lifetime of mediocrity had taught me one thing: adapt or die. And dying wasn't on my to-do list.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: Okay, okay, calm down. This is clearly some kind of fantasy world summoning. Everyone else looks just as lost. But... wait. Some of them look different. Stronger. Like they were *meant* for this.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My eyes scanned the group, quickly identifying the archetypes. The muscle-bound jock, the graceful swordswoman, the quiet, brooding type...

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: And then there's me. The cannon fodder. The guy who dies first to show how dangerous the world is. No, not me. I refuse to be that guy.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRRRRROOOOWL!

dialogue.speaker: Woman 1
dialogue.line: What was that?!

dialogue.speaker: Man 1
dialogue.line: Stay back! Something's coming!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANG! THUD!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A grotesque, green-skinned creature, barely taller than a child but wielding a rusty club, stumbled into the clearing. A goblin.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: Oh, for crying out loud. A goblin. The tutorial monster. This is exactly how it starts.

dialogue.speaker: Man 2
dialogue.line: Get away from me!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SCREAM!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The goblin lunged, its club swinging wildly. Chaos erupted. People scattered, some tripping over themselves in fear.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: This is it. This is where I die. Unless...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My gaze snapped to the quiet, brooding man I'd noticed earlier. He hadn't panicked. His eyes were sharp, assessing. He moved with a practiced ease.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Before anyone else could react, he was there. A simple, elegant movement.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SLICE!

dialogue.speaker: Goblin
dialogue.line: G-GAAAH?!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The goblin's head rolled, its body collapsing to the ground. Silence fell, broken only by ragged breaths.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: Holy crap. He just... one-shotted it. No hesitation. No fear. And that sword... it wasn't just any sword. It looked like it had seen battle.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: Everyone, calm down. More will come. We need to stick together.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: Kim Hyunsung. That's his name. I saw it on his status window earlier, briefly. Strength: EX. Agility: EX. Luck: EX. Wait... EX?! That's not normal. That's... regressor level.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A cold, calculating realization dawned on me. This wasn't just some random strong guy. This was *the* strong guy. The one who knew what was coming. The one who had done this before.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: He's the protagonist. He's been here, done that, and probably died doing it. He knows the future. He knows the dangers. And he's my ticket. My lifeline.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: Is everyone alright? Does anyone have any injuries?

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: My stats are trash. My combat ability is non-existent. I'm literally the weakest link. But I have one thing they don't: a brain that knows how to scheme. And a complete lack of shame.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: Okay, Kiyoung. Time to activate the 'Lee Kiyoung Survival Manual.' Step one: Identify the strongest. Step two: Attach yourself to them like a limpet. Step three: Make yourself indispensable, even if it means lying through your teeth.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: (A little shaky, but trying to sound brave) I-I think everyone's okay, sir! Thank you for saving us! That was incredible!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Kim Hyunsung turned his gaze towards me, a flicker of surprise in his eyes. Most people were still too stunned to speak.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: It was nothing. Just a goblin.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: "Just a goblin," he says. For him, maybe. For me, that was a death sentence. But I need to play my part. The grateful, slightly timid, but observant survivor.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: No, really! You were so fast! I... I don't think any of us would have made it without you. You seem to know what you're doing.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: I... I've just been in a few tough situations before.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: "A few tough situations." Yeah, like dying and coming back to life. He's trying to be humble. Good. That means he's probably a good person. Even better for me.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: (Taking a step closer, trying to look earnest) Sir, if... if it's not too much trouble, could we perhaps stick close to you? We're all so lost, and you seem to be the only one who knows how to handle this. We'll try not to be a burden!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Kim Hyunsung looked at me, then at the terrified faces of the others. A sigh escaped him, almost imperceptible.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Hyunsung
dialogue.line: Alright. But you need to follow my instructions precisely. No heroics. Understand?

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: Bingo. Hook, line, and sinker. The first step is complete. Now, to cement my position.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Kiyoung
dialogue.line: Yes, sir! Absolutely! We'll do whatever you say!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My heart pounded, not from fear, but from a surge of triumph. I was weak, pathetic, and utterly useless in a fight. But I was alive. And I had just found my golden ticket to survival in this hellish new world. The Regressor Instruction Manual had officially begun.

summary: Lee Kiyoung wakes up in a mysterious dungeon with abysmal stats, quickly realizing he's in a fantasy world. After a goblin attack, he identifies Kim Hyunsung as a regressor and immediately schemes to attach himself to the powerful protagonist for survival.
